---
title: "Kwai"
subtitle: "Platform Evaluation Report"
ugc_answers_file: "data/2025/global/kwai/ugc.yml"
ads_answers_file: "data/2025/global/kwai/ads.yml"
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

import sys
from pathlib import Path

# Add project root to path
project_root = Path.cwd()
while not (project_root / 'utils').exists() and project_root != project_root.parent:
    project_root = project_root.parent
if str(project_root) not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(project_root))

# Import helpers and load results
from utils.quarto_helpers import load_platform_results

results_ugc, results_ads = load_platform_results(
    ugc_file="data/2025/global/kwai/ugc.yml",
    ads_file="data/2025/global/kwai/ads.yml",
    year='2025'
)

```

This evaluation is based on Kwai's publicly available policies and documentation, as well as international regulatory frameworks [@dsa_regulation].


## User-Generated Content (UGC) Evaluation

### Overall UGC Score

**Total score:** `{python} f"{results_ugc['total_score']:.2f}"` / `{python} f"{results_ugc['total_max']:.2f}"` (`{python} f"{results_ugc['total_percentage']:.1f}"`%)

### UGC Category Scores

```{python}
#| label: ugc-category-scores
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

from utils.quarto_helpers import generate_category_scores
generate_category_scores(results_ugc, heading_level=3)
```


## Advertising (ADS) Evaluation

### Overall ADS Score

**Total score:** `{python} f"{results_ads['total_score']:.2f}"` / `{python} f"{results_ads['total_max']:.2f}"` (`{python} f"{results_ads['total_percentage']:.1f}"`%)

### ADS Category Scores

```{python}
#| label: ads-category-scores
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

from utils.quarto_helpers import generate_category_scores
generate_category_scores(results_ads, heading_level=3)
```


## References

::: {#refs}
:::
